title: Workplace exposure concern
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports recording suspected physical, biological, chemical, ergonomic or psychosocial workplace hazard type and affected work context without establishing exposure or causation.

source.title: NIOSH Health Hazard Evaluation (HHE) Program
source.jurisdiction: United States occupational-health programme; not a UAE regulatory standard
source.population: Workers, employers and unions concerned about potential workplace health hazards.
source.setting: Workplace hazard evaluation involving process observation, exposure information, worker health interviews, measurements and selected medical testing.
source.exclusions: Exact only for structuring an exposure concern and distinguishing workplace evaluation from individual diagnosis. It does not establish causation, legal duty, UAE entitlement, testing, fitness or compensation.

exact_location.heading: Overview — types of workplace health hazards and programme scope
exact_location.locator: official HHE Program overview sections “Key points” and “Overview”

assessment.text: Supports documenting work process, job, timing, reported exposure, symptoms, reports, measurements, privacy and occupational-evaluation context without generating tests, findings or recommendations.
assessment.rationale: Relevant to documenting job, task, timing, symptoms, reports, measurements and privacy when actually known; it cannot generate findings.
